title: Developer handoff for Review Specialized Agent Guardrails End To End
description: Make template resolution root-aware to active worktree/repo and add regression coverage for non-default root/template loading.

handoff_summary.completed: Updated prompt/template loading to resolve `templates/agents/<agent_type>.md` from an explicit root when provided, wired scheduler guardrail capture to use the active run `workdir`, and expanded tests to validate root-specific template loading and missing-template behavior under repository-local templates. Updated README guardrail runtime note to document root-aware behavior. Verified with full unit suite.
handoff_summary.remaining: No code changes remain for this bead scope.
handoff_summary.risks: Repository is concurrently dirty from sibling work; downstream agents should avoid assuming only these files changed in the worktree. Root-aware loading now requires `templates/agents/*.md` to exist in the active execution root/worktree (expected in tracked repo content).
handoff_summary.next_action: Proceed with review bead validation from a non-default checkout/import path to confirm consistent guardrail behavior without `PYTHONPATH=src` overrides.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: Any downstream agent validating this feature from a different checkout or installed-package path may still observe inconsistent behavior if they execute against a root that does not contain tracked `templates/agents/*.md`. Also, sibling-bead edits are present in the same worktree (`specs/specialized-agent-guardrails.md`, `src/codex_orchestrator/models.py`, `src/codex_orchestrator/storage.py`, and `templates/`), so coordinate before broad refactors.

conflict_risks: Any downstream agent validating this feature from a different checkout or installed-package path may still observe inconsistent behavior if they execute against a root that does not contain tracked `templates/agents/*.md`. Also, sibling-bead edits are present in the same worktree (`specs/specialized-agent-guardrails.md`, `src/codex_orchestrator/models.py`, `src/codex_orchestrator/storage.py`, and `templates/`), so coordinate before broad refactors.

execution_history.summary: Implemented root-aware guardrail template resolution for active repo/worktree execution roots and added regression coverage for non-default template roots.
